title: QuicklyOptimized
description: Another mod pack aiming to optimize Minecraft for lower end computers.
body:
Hey there! Welcome to another one of my modpacks, aimed to increase the performance of Minecraft, while trying to keeping the asthetics as tolerable as possible. _This mod pack is designed for multiplayer use_, but can very well be used for singleplayer worlds too.
_This pack is designed for 1.21.4+ servers_ and would not work well for servers under ~1.16.
This modpack will not work on the server side, and is designed ONLY for client use.

# NOTE:
Though mods that can result in you getting banned from multiplayer servers are disabled, it is heavily recommended to recheck what is and isn't allowed as per the server rules (if applicable).
**I do not take any responsibility of any sort of punishments as a result of this modpack.**
It is therefore recommended to remove such mods from the project.

===============================================================================
Some texture packs have been provided to aid in a performance boost, but can always be swapped out or disabled as per the user's wish. 
_It is also recommended to review the mods_ included in this pack yourself and remove the mods you deem would be unable to run/will provide a negative experience for you.

Some quality of life features have also been provided, though some are be disabled due to fair play in servers.
